note: Normative projection (Kleppmann): the differ compares THIS field-set + required/experimental flags + deprecations against a freshly-extracted projection, field by field. The byte-hash in specs/snapshots/.sha/agentskills-spec.sha is the cheap 're-extract?' tripwire only. The field set here IS the left-hand side of the coverage map: every field a downstream kernel schema relies on must appear here, or the dependency is unverified.
